title: Section 24
content: All appointments of the staff of every Institute, except that of the Director 1***, shall be made in accordance with the procedure laid down in the Statutes, by-- (a) the Board, if the appointment is made on the academic staff in the post of Lecturer or above or if the appointment is made on the non-academic staff in any cadre the maximum of the pay scale for which exceeds rupees ten thousand five hundred; (b) the Director, in any other case.
footnote: 1. The words "and Deputy Director" omitted by Act of 28 of 2012, s.12 (w. e. f 7-6-2012).
